form.formComment: Gelding by Trusty Lad making his first appearance. Runner-up in a Warwick trial over 800m on March 24. Facing a stiff test.

form.formComment: At the latest run eased back early on 6th of 9 at this track Mdn on March 24 over 1400m, slow going 4 len behind Leica Flamingo carrying 57kg at $4.60. The run before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1050m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Autumn Gale carrying 55.5kg at $2.70. Should be at peak fitness now and can't be ruled out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 6th of 8 at Springsure 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 900m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Loaded Weapon carrying 58kg at $11. Last start 5th of 8 at Mackay Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Pleasepleaseplease carrying 57kg at $41. Prefer in something a little easier.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at Ballarat F&M Mdn-Sw October 14 over 1400m, soft track; 4.5 len behind M'lady Rose carrying 58kg at $13. First up last campaign third of 10 at Moe F&M Mdn-Sw September 4 over 1208m, on heavy track; 3.5 len behind Mini Angel carrying 58kg at $9.50. Looks all set for a positive return.
